$schema_note: Canonical pointer to where the build is. Re-derive context from this + blackboard files; do not scroll chat history.

project.tagline: Orchestrate swarms of CLI coding agents in parallel across isolated git worktrees.

phase_status.4_mobile_client: done (v0.5.0; CI run 27567194903 GREEN 3 OSes [verify] + e2e (desktop) + e2e (mobile); independent Phase-4 Critic ALL-PASS incl §6.3; axe a11y 0 critical/serious; phone perf budgets PASS; P12 done. phase_status.5_platform_setup: done (v0.6.0; CI run 27579893046 GREEN — verify x3 + e2e desktop+mobile + new package x3 [electron-builder --dir cold on all 3 OS]; independent Phase-5 Critic ALL-PASS. grove up/start/stop/status lifecycle (P13); cloudflared remote tunnel-URL pairing -> on-device SW+push (Caddy-TLS secure-context proof); electron-builder NSIS/dmg/AppImage; real 97.6MB NSIS installer + packaged GUI launch evidence (P14). Linear P13/P14 Done.)
phase_status.6_hardening_launch: in_progress (launch-hardening: a11y source fixes in @swarm/ui + license-audit + cross-platform perf re-measure + security review + docs + HANDOFF -> v1.0.0; opened 2026-06-16, ADR-0018)

stack_decision.db: PGlite (embedded Postgres, WASM) via Drizzle ORM; real Postgres optional
stack_decision.sync: self-hosted WebSocket + PGlite-backed append-only event log + resume tokens
stack_decision.pty: @homebridge/node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch (ConPTY on Windows; prebuilds win/mac/linux incl Node24 ABI, no compiler) — VALIDATED ADR-0007a; PTY layer/host engine runs under NODE not Bun (Bun tears down ConPTY net.Socket on Windows); tree-kill verified killing process trees
stack_decision.mobile: PWA-first (service worker, Web Push/VAPID); Capacitor optional/deferred

next_actions: [ACTIVE — Phase 6 / launch-hardening, ADR-0018] Wave 1: a11y SOURCE fixes in @swarm/ui — (a) lighten dark `fgSubtle` so text-fg-subtle holds AA 4.5 on raised+overlay (verified failing today: #828d88 on overlay #212826 = 4.38:1) and extend packages/ui/src/tokens.test.ts to assert fg-subtle on raised+overlay both themes; mirror the hex in tokens.css; (b) Dialog/Sheet must be display:none when not [open] at the source (emit `flex` only while open) so the closed-overlay full-bleed quirk dies — removes the per-consumer conditional-mount workaround; (c) TerminalFrame prop to hide the inert mobile Find/Split buttons. Re-run axe desktop+mobile -> evidence/phase-6/a11y-report.md.

[Phase 6] Wave 2 evidence: license-audit (whole-product, ADR-0008) -> evidence/phase-6/license-audit.md (OSS-only proof); CROSS-PLATFORM perf re-measure (Phase-3 terminal-stream p95 tail was interactive-Windows-PowerShell variance; re-measure on Linux/macOS, CI-measured numbers preferred) -> evidence/phase-6/perf-report.md with speed budgets met; security review -> evidence/phase-6/security-review.md.
[Phase 6] Wave 3 docs: README + getting-started (incl the phone-only path) + docs/demo.md; then HANDOFF.md.

[Phase 6] Gate + sign-off: clean-install cold gate -> push -> confirm 3-OS CI green (verify x3 + e2e desktop + e2e mobile + package x3) -> evidence/phase-6/ci-green.md; independent Phase-6 Critic (did NOT build) writes evidence/phase-6/review.md per §6.1/§6.3/§6.4; on ALL-PASS cut v1.0.0 (the FINAL release) + write HANDOFF.md.

[harness retro follow-up, at a clean boundary] route the CI-gate lessons (turbo-cache false-green -> --force; --force != CI -> clean-install gate; gate the test step at DEFAULT-or-capped concurrency not --concurrency=1; billing-misdiagnosis rule; re-gate AFTER adding evidence/QA specs) into recursive-harness artifacts via /retro -> /harness-pr
critic_followups_for_phase2: [DONE wave-1] @swarm/api completed to all 13 routers of architecture §3.1; SwarmConfig now Command[] arrays + per-OS shells + per-field overlay (9 tests)
[phase-1 a11y nit, non-blocking] extend tokens.test.ts to assert fg-subtle AA on raised+overlay surfaces (currently only surface); fold into Phase 6 a11y audit if it forces a token tweak
